modeSelect.heading: How is Glaon connecting to Home Assistant?
modeSelect.subheading: Pick the option that matches where you are right now. You can change this later from the settings menu.

local.title: Local — same Wi-Fi as your home
local.description: Sign in directly to Home Assistant. Fastest, no Glaon cloud account needed.
local.probing: Looking for a Home Assistant on your network…
local.notFound: Couldn't auto-detect Home Assistant; pick this option to enter the URL manually.

cloud.title: Cloud — anywhere on the internet
cloud.description: Sign in with your Glaon account. Connects through the Glaon relay.
cloud.unavailable: Cloud is not configured for this build.

manual.label: Or enter your Home Assistant URL manually

shell.signedInPlaceholder: Signed in. The Phase 2 dashboard lands once #10–#12 wire the HA WebSocket.

cloudUnavailable.body: VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY is not configured for this build.

homeOverview.title: Home Overview
homeOverview.subtitle: Tell us about your home so Glaon can localize units, time, and language for you.

location.label: Location
